mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is persistently near zero and CPIAUCSL is rising, the market reads the setup as continued policy support with contained real-rate pressure, which lifts equity valuations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
regime_hint: post-easing recovery with low policy rates
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are negative in most low-rate inflationary months, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent floor indicates weakening household income and slower demand, so equities sell off over the next 20 trading days as earnings expectations are revised down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-threshold episodes are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average forward return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent acceleration in INDPRO and PAYEMS signals real production and payroll growth, which confirms broad economic momentum and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if joint INDPRO-PAYEMS upswings do not outperform single-variable signals, or if 60-day forward returns are not positive in the majority of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly rise in RSAFS indicates stronger retail demand, which boosts near-term revenue expectations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth turns positive and exceeds its prior 3-month average by 1 standard deviation
failure_condition: Reject if retail-sales breakout episodes are not followed by above-baseline 5-day SPX gains, or if the signal reverses sign in rolling 1-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in HOUST captures housing-cycle momentum that feeds wealth effects and construction activity, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if housing upturns are followed by flat or negative 60-day SPX returns, or if GDP-confirmed housing signals fail to outperform unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains below inflation, real rates become more negative and equities reprice higher over the following 20 trading days because discount rates stay suppressed.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year change exceeds FEDFUNDS by at least 2 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-above-policy episodes are not associated with higher 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term adds no predictive power over either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: In a reopening recovery, falling UNRATE combined with rising PAYEMS signals improving labor utilization and stronger consumption, which lifts S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if labor-improvement pairs do not outperform independent effects, or if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive when unemployment falls and payrolls rise together.

mechanism_narrative: During a housing slowdown, declining HOUST while GDPC1 growth is weak identifies broad demand deceleration, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter as earnings expectations deteriorate.
failure_condition: Reject if housing-plus-GDP slowdown regimes do not lead to below-baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if the joint signal is not negative in most weak-growth observations.
